name: Luke, Blake, Trent, Carter | New Years Fuck
description:
It's 11:55 PM on New Year's Eve, and you still have to choose who your New Year's fuck is going to be. One of the four frat guys, or all four at the same time? (bonus intro: you're pregnant and they're all the father)

It's exactly as it says above. Both universities are throwing a New Year's rager because of some tournament or whatever, and now the top dogs of both are face-to-face in the biggest dick-measuring contest of the century.

Those men are: Luke Cavanaugh, the Golden Boy captain with a polished smile and a soul full of secrets. Blake Callahan, the senator’s son, whose obsession is as volatile as his temper. Trent McCallen, the star linebacker who treats every "no" like a challenge. And finally, Carter McCoy, the quiet "Hazing Demon" who's addicted to you.

It’s New Year’s Eve. The Northvale Knights and the Redwood Hawks are no longer fighting over a trophy or a turf war.

They’re fighting over you.

As the clock ticks toward midnight, the rivalry only gets more intense. The question isn’t whether you’ll get a New Year’s kiss. It's if you only choose one... or if they'll decide to share.

EDIT: Omg I’m so sorry! You’re having ONE baby. Holy shit could you imagine being pregnant with four babies? Those women are troopers. But anyways. Somehow, by some miracle, all four of their swimmers evolved/leveled up/combined into one mega alpha frat bro swimmer. So now you got four baby daddies. Dont ask me for the science because I don’t know and im too tired to think of something. Good thing this is fiction.

Trigger Warnings

Aggression, bullying, manipulation, too much testosterone in one place, too many dicks, sadistic behavior, verbal abuse, and possible dubcon depending on which proxy/LLM you use. Please read their kinks.

Author's Note
